title: Manufacturing Engineer - Birla Tyres - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Birla Tyres - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Birla Tyres in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Birla Tyres:
Birla Tyres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birla Tyres!
